user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
**Draft Follow-up Message:**

---

Hi [Customer's Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I wanted to quickly follow up on the ticket we marked as resolved 5 days ago. Is everything still working smoothly on your end, or have you run into any issues since then?

No action needed if all is good — just reply and let me know either way. Happy to help if anything else comes up.

Best regards,  
Compass  
OpenClaw Support
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly fulfilled the user's request by providing a well-structured draft follow-up message that aligns with its persona and guidelines.
